_doc: Per-paper find/replace patches applied as the LAST step of paper_extraction.py. Use only when the upstream arxiv source has a defect that cannot be repaired in any tracked sidecar (citation-map / macro-map / packages / macros).

find_replace.comment: Macro defined in arXiv-2506/custom_latex.tex via the paper-author meta-macro \bilingualcommand{\textiff}{if and only if}{si et seulement si}, which paper_parsing.py does not recognise. Substitute BEFORE \textif (substring safety). Wrapped in \text{} (amsmath) so it renders as upright roman in math mode rather than math-italic letters. Currently unused in the extracted body; kept for re-extractions if the upstream paper changes.
From \bilingualcommand{\textif}{if}{si}. Wrapped in \text{} (amsmath) for upright text-mode rendering inside cases environments.
From \bilingualcommand{\textand}{and}{et}. Wrapped in \text{}. Not used in the body itself, but \quand / \qquand in arXiv-2506-macros.tex were hand-edited to inline \text{and} for the same reason.
From \bilingualcommand{\otherwise}{otherwise}{sinon}. Wrapped in \text{} for upright rendering.
From \bilingualcommand{\where}{where}{où}. Wrapped in \text{}. Currently unused in the extracted body.
